'''Krickle''' was a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] in [[Talon Karrde]]'s association during [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], serving under [[Shirlee Faughn]] aboard the ''[[Starry Ice]]''.<ref name="TCSWE" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
